_meta.purpose: Adversarially-verified corpus-coverage overrides applied by build_frontier_map.py. Each entry: a corpus claim discharged (verified) or partially addressed (partial) by a named kernel-verified theorem, confirmed by an independent skeptic pass.
_meta.provenance: workflow run wf_0230ddd8-5a5 (corpus-coverage-remap): 486 claims mapped vs VERIFIED.md, every verified/partial upgrade re-checked by an adversarial verifier; 18 confirmed, 2 downgraded verified->partial, 0 rejected. Closure-program re-audit (5 independent skeptic agents, one per candidate): 7 existing partial/verified mappings re-confirmed unchanged (pollard-rho-collision-002, mov-random-q-006, semaev-definition-001, semaev-recursion-degree-002, glv-root-mod-n-008, glv-jzero-orderthree-005 all genuinely partial); ONE upgrade smart-secp256k1-boundary-006 partial->verified (capstone Ecdlp.Curve.secp256k1_classical_security_profile proves BOTH conjuncts: Nat.card = n [cofactor 1] AND Nat.Prime n [prime order]); ONE reclassification cheon-multidivisor-crt-004 tractable->partial (CRT reconstruction kernel is already proved by Ecdlp.PohligHellman.reconstruct [two-factor ZMod.chineseRemainder bijection]; the load-bearing attack step 'auxiliary powers => residues recoverable' and the n-ary product remain unproven, hence partial not verified). Blocked-bucket re-audit (5 strict skeptic agents over all 168 blocked claims — semaev 51, cost_model 38, quantum_cost 30, lattice_reduction 25, weil_pairing 8, elliptic_nets 7, curve_depth 5, heights 4): 164 confirmed correctly blocked; 3 blocked->partial reclassifications (foundation was mislabeled, an existing theorem discharges the concrete case): glv-endomorphism-definition-003 (was weil_pairing; Ecdlp.Curve.glvPoint_add proves the secp256k1 GLV endomorphism is additive/a homomorphism, general all-extensions case uncovered), glv-prime-field-generalization-007 (was weil_pairing; Ecdlp.Curve.secp256k1_glvHom_eq_zsmul_unconditional realizes GLV as scalar mult on secp256k1, general prime-field class uncovered), lauter-stange-elliptic-net-recurrence-003 (was lattice_reduction; Ecdlp.EDS.isEllSequence_of_rec_one proves rank-1 nets are EDS, arbitrary-rank nets uncovered); plus 1 heuristic-foundation fix in build_frontier_map.py (bare 'parity' keyword over-matched lauter-stange-residue-product-parity-013, a pure quadratic-residuosity claim, into cost_model). Informal-bucket audit (5 skeptic agents over all 238 status='informal' claims): 225 confirmed genuinely informal; 5 discharge findings recorded here (5 partial, each citing a built no-sorry theorem): galbraith-diem-scope-004 partial (Ecdlp.Curve.secp256k1_generator_equation — machine-realizes the claim's definitional premise, the curve y^2=x^3+7 over F_p with p prime; the substantive Diem-scope assertion itself remains uncovered, so partial not verified), shoup-index-calculus-excluded-005 partial (generic_success_le), satoh-nonprime-p-primary-extension-008 partial (PohligHellman.component), mov-secp256k1-applicability-boundary-010 partial (secp256k1_embedding_degree_gt_100), glv-security-screening-020 partial (secp256k1_classical_security_profile); the audit's other 8 findings (informal->blocked, foundation-gated with no theorem) are in corpus_reclassify.json.
_meta.note: Overrides win over the heuristic/VERIFIED-membership classification. Only verified/partial upgrades are recorded here; lateral reclassifications and demotions of existing verified claims are intentionally NOT auto-applied.
